en_US: Argenta: Oh my! A challenger, all
the way out here?
How delightful. I am Argenta,
matron of the Battle Hall.
I imagine there were tense moments
getting here with your chosen one.
But understand that one shines the
brightest when a challenge is overcome.
We Frontier Brains still talk while we
are on vacation, and I’ve already heard
so much about you thanks to Dahlia and
darling Thorton!
Do show me your favorite Pokémon.
I must battle them for myself and see if
that brilliance is genuine.
Argenta: Fufu... Splendid!
Simply splendid.
A good Trainer doesn’t force their
favorite on anyone.
A good one keeps with their favorite
without drama or fanfare.
That is how I see it, at least.
And, by the way I see it, you’re an
excellent Trainer!
The house does not often lose, yet
you made it look so easy.
Here, take this to remember your win.
Those Ability Capsules allow you to
change a Pokémon’s Ability.
A favorite needn’t be left behind
for such a small reason.
I shall remember this. Until we
meet again in the Hall.
Argenta: Oh dear. A performance
needs two partners, you know.
Return to me with two Pokemon fit
to battle, and we shall play.
